flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northern Michigan University are 15% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($47.1k vs $55.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northern Michigan University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.9k → $14.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northern Michigan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
